title: Gate 26: Taming Power of the Great
description: You have an instinctive talent for recognizing what's valuable and knowing how to share it persuasively. You can promote, sell, and influence — but your power is anchored in genuine belief in what you're promoting.
topic: Gate 26: Taming Power of the Great
learningGoal: The viewer understands what Gate 26 (Taming Power of the Great — The Great Accumulator) means in their daily life, in plain terms.
keyPoints: You have an instinctive talent for recognizing what's valuable and knowing how to share it persuasively.
You can promote, sell, and influence
but your power is anchored in genuine belief in what you're promoting.
forbiddenClaims: a gate guarantees a talent you do not have to develop
gates rank people as better or worse
an activated gate forces a fixed behaviour

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: Gate 26: Taming Power of the Great — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: Gate 26: Taming Power of the Great — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.hook: Gate 26: Taming Power of the Great — try this today.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: Gate 26: Taming Power of the Great — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: Gate 26: Taming Power of the Great — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: You have an instinctive talent for recognizing what's valuable and knowing how to share it persuasively. You can promote, sell, and influence — but your power is anchored in genuine belief in what you're promoting.
